notableEvents.label: Jordan Beck pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Beck grounds out, third baseman Manny Machado to first baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.label: Nick Castellanos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Castellanos grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Manny Machado out at 3rd. Nick Castellanos out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Castellanos rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Castellanos grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Manny Machado out at 3rd. Nick Castellanos out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ty France plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ty France hit by pitch. Xander Bogaerts to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Johnson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rockies challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Bryce Johnson grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Xander Bogaerts out at 3rd. Bryce Johnson out at 1st.
